Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Financial transaction for the user, representing either a sale (entrada) or an expense (saida).

uid.description: The User ID of the owner of this transaction

amount.description: Gross amount of the transaction. Sales are positive, expenses are negative.

type.description: Whether the transaction is a sale or an expense

date.description: Date of the transaction in YYYY-MM-DD format

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds representing creation time

transactions/{transactionId}.description: Storage for all users' financial transactions, isolated by the uid field.
